---
title: "Figure 1e"
author: "JuHyeongYu"
date: "2026-03-08"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggnewscale)
library(ggpubr)
library(cowplot)
library(grid)

# 1. Data Loading & Harmonization
file_path <- '/Users/zzuhyeong2/Documents/JoonAhn_Lab/Project1/41467_2024_54434_MOESM5_ESM.xlsx'

# Load and align schemas for Global and Phospho datasets
sheet3_raw <- read_excel(file_path, sheet = 3) %>% select(-1) %>% mutate(Source_Type = "Global Proteome")
sheet4_raw <- read_excel(file_path, sheet = 4) %>% mutate(Source_Type = "Phosphoproteome")
combined_raw <- bind_rows(sheet3_raw, sheet4_raw)

# 2. Target Pathway Mapping
target_mapping <- c(
  "GOCC_MITOCHONDRIAL_MATRIX" = "Subtype 1", "HALLMARK_OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION" = "Subtype 1",
  "GOBP_CELLULAR_RESPIRATION" = "Subtype 1", "PATH-NP_EGFR1_PATHWAY" = "Subtype 2",
  "PATH-NP_IL33_PATHWAY" = "Subtype 2", "PATH-NP_NOTCH_PATHWAY" = "Subtype 2",
  "KINASE-PSP_CDK2" = "Subtype 3", "HALLMARK_E2F_TARGETS" = "Subtype 3",
  "HALLMARK_G2M_CHECKPOINT" = "Subtype 3", "GOCC_SECRETORY_GRANULE" = "Subtype 4",
  "REACTOME_NEUTROPHIL_DEGRANULATION" = "Subtype 4", "HALLMARK_HYPOXIA" = "Subtype 4",
  "PATH-WP_PI3K-Akt_Signaling_Pathway" = "Subtype 4", "HALLMARK_ALLOGRAFT_REJECTION" = "Subtype 5",
  "HALLMARK_TNFA_SIGNALING_VIA_NFKB" = "Subtype 5"
)

# 3. Data Preprocessing & Signal-based Selection
p_1e_data <- combined_raw %>%
  filter(Pathway %in% names(target_mapping)) %>%
  group_by(Pathway) %>%
  # Select Source_Type with the strongest absolute Z-score sum across all subtypes
  mutate(row_signal = rowSums(abs(across(where(is.numeric))), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = row_signal, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Median.Subtype"), names_to = "Subtype_raw", values_to = "Z_score") %>%
  mutate(
    Subtype_Num = gsub("Median.Subtype", "Subtype ", Subtype_raw),
    is_main = ifelse(target_mapping[Pathway] == Subtype_Num, "Main", "Other"),
    Pathway = factor(Pathway, levels = rev(names(target_mapping)))
  )

# Extract distinct markers for Y-axis side boxes
source_marker_data <- p_1e_data %>% distinct(Pathway, Source_Type)

# Color Palettes
source_cols <- c("Global Proteome" = "#76A457", "Phosphoproteome" = "#D95F44")
subtype_cols <- c("Subtype 1" = "#E1726C", "Subtype 2" = "#B3B2D6", "Subtype 3" = "#F6C845", "Subtype 4" = "#89C5B2", "Subtype 5" = "#7198C4")

# 4. Main Plot Construction
p_main <- ggplot(p_1e_data, aes(x = Z_score, y = Pathway)) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = 0, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, fill = "grey75", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "#D13A2F", linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  # Y-axis side boxes (Data Type Markers)
  geom_point(data = source_marker_data, aes(x = -10.9, y = Pathway, fill = Source_Type), 
             shape = 22, size = 7, stroke = 0.45, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = source_cols, guide = "none") +
  
  new_scale_fill() +
  # Z-score dots with conditional stroke highlighting for main subtypes
  geom_point(aes(fill = Subtype_Num, color = is_main), shape = 21, size = 8, stroke = 1.1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = subtype_cols, guide = "none") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Main" = "black", "Other" = "white"), guide = "none") +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 10, 5), limits = c(-13, 12.5), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_pubr() +
  labs(x = "Z-score", y = NULL) +
  
  # Offset clipping to allow markers outside the panel boundary
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-10.5, 12), clip = "off") +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, margin = margin(r = 18)),
    axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.16, "cm"),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 130, 30, 10),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

# 5. Subtype Legend (Dummy Plot)
legend_subtype_plot <- ggplot(data.frame(S = paste0("Subtype ", 1:5), x = 1, y = 1:5), aes(x, y, fill = S)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 6, stroke = 1.1, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = subtype_cols, name = NULL) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12), 
    legend.key.size = unit(0.6, "cm"), 
    legend.key.height = unit(1, "cm")
  )
legend_subtype <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_subtype_plot)

subtype_legend_box <- grobTree(
  rectGrob(gp = gpar(fill = "white", col = "black", lwd = 1)),
  legend_subtype
)

# 6. Source Legend (Dummy Plot)
legend_source_plot <- ggplot(data.frame(ST = names(source_cols), x = 1, y = 1), aes(x, y, fill = ST)) +
  geom_point(shape = 22, size = 4, stroke = 0.45, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = source_cols, name = NULL) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.text = element_text(size = 11))
legend_source <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_source_plot)

source_legend_box <- grobTree(
  rectGrob(gp = gpar(fill="white", col="black", lwd=1)),
  legend_source
)

# 7. Final Assembly
fig1e <- ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(p_main, x = 0, y = 0.05, width = 0.8, height = 0.95) +
  
  # Subtype Legen
  draw_grob(
    subtype_legend_box, 
    x = 0.60,            
    y = 0.20, 
    width = 0.10,       
    height = 0.25
  ) +
  
  # Source Legend
  draw_grob(
    source_legend_box, 
    x = 0.02, 
    y = 0.05, 
    width = 0.20, 
    height = 0.05
  )

# Export
ggsave("figure_1e.png", fig1e, width = 14, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```
